title: Rising Star in Video Production
description: Awarded for storytelling quality, visual pacing, and technical edit execution.
highlight: Produced 20+ commercial videos with over 5M total views.
focus: Led color grading and motion design pipelines across campaign deliverables.

title: Documentary Excellence
description: Won Best Editing for shaping a clear narrative from complex documentary footage.
highlight: Crafted a compelling story arc from 60+ hours of raw footage.
focus: Applied parallel storytelling while preserving emotional continuity.

title: Creative Campaign Distinction
description: Recognized for high-impact short-form and long-form narrative content.
highlight: Increased completion rates with tighter rhythm and clearer visual flow.
focus: Built repeatable editing templates to scale quality across campaigns.

title: Post-Production Craft Award
description: Acknowledged for consistency in finishing, sound polish, and final delivery quality.
highlight: Improved turnaround speed while maintaining visual standards.
focus: Standardized review feedback loops for cleaner final cuts.
